reasoning: The key limiter here is Koren's lactate clearance and underdeveloped aerobic base. His power drop-off from 5 to 20 minutes indicates a need for more structured over-under and extended sweet spot intervals. This workout is designed to simulate the sustained efforts required on the Alpine Loop, particularly on segments like the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-min over-under intervals: 6 mins at 242W, 3 mins at 218W, 3 mins at 256W. 3-min recovery at 50% FTP between intervals.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
